title_short: Evaluation Metrics for XAI: A Review, Taxonomy, and Practical Applications
notes: Taxonomy seed for Paper C; motivates explicit metric-family organization.

title_short: A Survey on LLM-as-a-Judge
notes: Frames judge design patterns, failure modes, and validation concerns.

title_short: Attribution-based Explanations that Provide Recourse
notes: Shows tension between robustness and recourse sensitivity.

title_short: Automating expert-level medical reasoning evaluation of large language models
notes: Illustrates domain-aware rubric scoring with expert-linked evaluation.

title_short: B-XAIC Dataset: Benchmarking Explainable AI for Graph Neural Networks Using Chemical Data
notes: Ground-truth-rationale benchmark for graph explanations.

title_short: Consensus on Feature Attributions in the Rashomon Set
notes: Introduces model-multiplicity uncertainty into attribution interpretation.

title_short: Discovering Salient Neurons in deep NLP models
notes: Useful mainly for keeping representation-level interpretability distinct from post-hoc attribution evaluation.

title_short: Evaluating explainability for graph neural networks
notes: Supports modality-specific caveats for graph settings.

title_short: Evaluating the necessity of the multiple metrics for assessing explainable AI: A critical examination
notes: Argues that multi-metric suites capture complementary behavior.

title_short: Evaluation of Neural Network Explanations and Beyond
notes: Used to support transparent and standardized evaluation reporting.

title_short: Explaining Deep Models in PaddlePaddle
notes: Practical toolkit example showing modular integration concerns.

title_short: F-Fidelity: A Robust Framework for Faithfulness Evaluation of Explainable AI
notes: Pushes faithfulness interpretation toward robustness-aware testing.

title_short: Globally-Consistent Rule-Based Summary-Explanations for Machine Learning Models
notes: Helps distinguish local quality from global consistency.

title_short: Judging LLM-as-a-Judge with MT-Bench and Chatbot Arena
notes: Key evidence that LLM judges need empirical calibration against human preferences.

title_short: On the Complexity of SHAP-Score-Based Explanations
notes: Supports cost and tractability as first-class evaluation concerns.

title_short: On the Faithfulness of Vision Transformer Explanations
notes: Shows that faithfulness metrics can fail to discriminate even within a mature modality.

title_short: OpenXAI: Towards a Transparent Evaluation of Post hoc Model Explanations
notes: Repository-aligned benchmark toolkit emphasizing transparent artifact structure.

title_short: Quantus: An Explainable AI Toolkit for Responsible Evaluation of Neural Network Explanations and Beyond
notes: Toolkit reference for evaluation metric definitions and implementation discipline.

title_short: Sampling Permutations for Shapley Value Estimation
notes: Explains why runtime and variance can depend on estimator design rather than explainer family alone.

title_short: The Faithful Shapley Interaction Index
notes: Highlights interaction effects omitted by simpler feature-attribution setups.

title_short: User perceptions vs. proxy LLM judges: Privacy and helpfulness in LLM responses to privacy-sensitive scenarios
notes: Strong external-validity warning for proxy-judge conclusions.

title_short: Using Prototypical Few-Shot Architecture for Explainable AI
notes: Included mainly as a scope boundary against intrinsic and representation-level interpretability claims.

title_short: Using Shapley Values and Variational Autoencoders to Explain Predictive Models with Dependent Mixed Features
notes: Supports dependence-aware caveats for tabular perturbation metrics.

title_short: XAI Beyond Classification
notes: Used to mark the current survey as classification-centered and post-hoc bounded.
